description: Declarative routing policy: task-type → preferred model → fallback chain → price/quota ceiling. RECOMMEND-ONLY (D6): nhq-econ reads this to flag mode-drift and ceiling breaches; nothing here auto-switches or auto-downshifts a live agent. The hybrid posture (plan §P5): layer this routing formalism on top of NHQ's zero-quota Antigravity rotator — keep the subscription-rotation economics, do NOT layer pay-per-token billing on top.

agy_floor.note: The zero-quota Antigravity rotation — the free floor. agy-floor share = the fraction of fleet sessions that rode the free floor rather than paid tokens. The first time the agy-floor is measured at all (plan §P5).
